task_objective: Adjust Versions list typography (increase font size to 16px, indent to 24px) and resolve premature wrapping of the Last Operation status message
tests_added: Updated static frontend tests in tests/test_frontend_static.py to verify Versions 16px font and 24px padding, and Last Operation minWidth: 0
design_decisions: Increased Versions font size to 16px and paddingLeft to 24px for cleaner typography and better alignment with surrounding UI elements.

Added minWidth: 0 to the Last Operation value container div. This forces the nested flex container to compute the width correctly in the Steam Deck UI browser engine, preventing premature wrapping of the status message.
results: All quality control checks (ruff, format, type-check) and all 246 pytest tests pass successfully.
